assertions.title: Brand management CRUD + deactivate, required on products

steps.action: Check live API surface with curl -sS -i http://localhost:8081/actuator/health
steps.expected: App reachable for direct API brand CRUD checks
steps.observed: curl exit code 7: localhost:8081 unavailable; switched to assertion-specific Maven test evidence per flow guidance

steps.expected: Brand CRUD assertions execute and pass

steps.action: Verify list + required-brand contract references via source grep/read
steps.expected: List endpoint exists and product payload enforces brand requirement
steps.observed: CatalogController exposes GET /api/v1/catalog/brands (line 43); CatalogService.listBrands(active) present (line 90); CatalogProductRequest has @NotNull(message="Brand is required") on brandId (line 13); CatalogService.createProduct uses requireActiveBrand(...) (line 131)

commands: grep/read references in CatalogController.java, CatalogService.java, CatalogProductRequest.java
evidence.observedOutput: Maven summary: Tests run: 8, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0; BUILD SUCCESS
evidence.network: Local health probe failed (curl: could not connect to localhost:8081); validation executed through Maven test surface

steps.action: Run catalog CRUD test suite command (same Maven command above)
steps.expected: Product attribute test covering full payload passes
Test verifies name, brand, multi-color, multi-size, carton mappings, SKU generation, UOM, HSN, GST
steps.observed: Assertions confirm sku=BBR-EXTERIOREMUL-001, colors=[Red,Blue], sizes=[1L,4L], cartonSizes=[1L:24,4L:6], unitOfMeasure=LITER

assertions.title: Bulk product operations with per-item validation/error reporting

steps.action: Run catalog bulk test suite command (same Maven command above)
steps.expected: Bulk upsert tests execute with mixed valid/invalid payload handling

steps.action: Inspect mixed valid+invalid and field-level validation test assertions
steps.expected: Per-item success/failure counters and error messages are captured
steps.observed: Response asserts total=2, succeeded=1, failed=1; failed item action=FAILED with message containing 'cartonSizes mapping is required'; second test verifies field-level messages for brandId/name/unitOfMeasure/hsnCode/gstRate

assertions.title: FinishedGoodsService decomposed to focused services under 500 lines

steps.action: Count lines for decomposed services with wc -l
steps.observed: Catalog=38, Stock=58, Reservation=22, Dispatch=64, Facade FinishedGoodsService=180

steps.expected: At least one decomposition-path integration flow passes
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS, Tests run: 1, Failures: 0, Errors: 0

steps.action: Attempt broader FinishedGoodsService test execution for 'all tests pass' criterion
steps.observed: Blocked by infrastructure/test instability: (a) without ddl-auto override -> schema mismatch error (column state_code missing), (b) class-level rerun later -> ApplicationContext import error for AbstractIntegrationTest.class

commands: wc -l FinishedGoodsCatalogService.java FinishedGoodsStockService.java FinishedGoodsReservationService.java FinishedGoodsDispatchService.java FinishedGoodsService.java
evidence.observedOutput: Line counts satisfy <500 target for decomposed services. Focused integration test passed (1/1). Full class verification failed due context/classpath instability in this run.
evidence.network: Testcontainers PostgreSQL started successfully for focused test; broader run unstable

assertions.issues: Could not complete stable full-class pass proof for FinishedGoodsService tests in this environment; decomposition line-count proof is complete, but all-tests-pass criterion is blocked by test harness instability.

frictions.description: Runtime API surface at http://localhost:8081 was unavailable (curl connection failure), so direct live API assertions could not be exercised.
frictions.resolution: Used assertion-specific Maven tests as the permitted API/test user surface fallback from flow guidance.

frictions.description: FinishedGoods integration evidence required extra runtime flag alignment and still showed non-deterministic class-level instability.
frictions.resolution: Applied -Dspring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update and validated a focused test method; full class run remained unstable.

blockers.description: Cannot fully satisfy VAL-CAT-004 'all tests pass' evidence in this session due FinishedGoodsServiceTest class-level instability (schema mismatch without override; later ApplicationContext import/classpath failure on broader rerun).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried with -Dspring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update and narrowed to focused method; focused method passed but broad class verification still failed.

summary: Validated 4 assertions using API/test surface evidence fallback (Maven tests) because localhost:8081 was unavailable. VAL-CAT-001, VAL-CAT-002, VAL-CAT-003 passed with concrete test evidence. VAL-CAT-004 remains blocked: decomposition line-count checks pass and one focused FinishedGoods integration test passes, but full all-tests-pass proof for that surface was unstable in this environment.
